CustomField.description: The LD Convert and Reroute fields are the one's LeanData will populate, and then map to the Account that is auto-created. LD Convert is used when the Existing Lead (the lead that the new lead matched to) is supposed to be converted to a Contact on the newly created account. LD Re-route is used when the Existing Lead should be turned into it's own separate Account (because the countries were not an exact match).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The LD Convert is a field that LD will populate, and then map to the Account that is auto-created. LD Convert is used when the Existing Lead (the lead that the new lead matched to) is supposed to be converted to a Contact on the newly created account.
CustomField.label: LD Convert
